parsed.availability_comment: Available for opening fixtures based on squad inclusion and no adverse March 2026 availability news found.
parsed.availability_note: No current injury or release report found; T20 World Cup ended on 2026-03-08, before IPL phase-one fixtures.
parsed.followup_reason: Availability is clear; remaining uncertainty is selection, not squad status.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Strong overseas competition keeps him outside guaranteed XI status.

parsed.playing_xi_comment: In PBKS squad but early XI spot looks matchup-dependent behind other overseas options.
